summary: Iteration 91 - Offline-First Web Mode Testing Complete. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend tests verified: Cooperative Dashboard loads with offlineCooperativeApi, DashboardHeader shows sync status indicator (data-testid='sync-status-indicator'), OfflineBanner correctly hidden when online, MembersPage and LotsPage load successfully. Service worker accessible at /service-worker.js with Network-First API caching strategy.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: GET /api/health returns 200 - used by OfflineContext for connectivity detection
PASS: GET /api/cooperative/dashboard returns 200 with coop_info, members, parcelles data
PASS: GET /api/cooperative/dashboard-kpis returns 200 with KPI data
PASS: GET /api/cooperative/dashboard-charts returns 200 with chart data
PASS: GET /api/cooperative/members returns 200 with members list
PASS: GET /api/cooperative/members?limit=500 works for sync operations
PASS: GET /api/cooperative/lots returns 200 with lots list
PASS: GET /service-worker.js returns service worker with CACHE_NAME='greenlink-v2' and API_CACHE='greenlink-api-v2'
PASS: Frontend Cooperative Dashboard loads with data-testid='cooperative-dashboard'
PASS: Frontend DashboardHeader shows sync status indicator with data-testid='sync-status-indicator' showing 'En ligne'
PASS: Frontend OfflineBanner correctly hidden when online with no pending actions
PASS: Frontend MembersPage loads with data-testid='members-page'
PASS: Frontend LotsPage loads with data-testid='lots-page'
PASS: AuthContext.jsx triggers auto-sync on login for cooperative/field_agent users (lines 157-167)
PASS: offlineCooperativeApi.js wraps cooperativeApi with IndexedDB fallback
PASS: offlineDB.js has COOP_MEMBERS, COOP_LOTS, COOP_DASHBOARD stores
PASS: Service worker uses Network-First strategy for /api/* endpoints with cache fallback
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 91 verified the offline-first web mode implementation. Key components: 1) OfflineContext provides isOnline, syncing, pendingCount state, 2) OfflineBanner shows status when offline/syncing/pending, 3) offlineDB.js has IndexedDB stores for coop data, 4) offlineCooperativeApi.js wraps API calls with cache fallback, 5) DashboardHeader has sync indicator, 6) AuthContext triggers auto-sync on login, 7) Service worker caches API responses. All cooperative pages (Dashboard, Members, Lots) now use offlineCooperativeApi.

offline_banner.behavior: Hidden when online with no pending actions

service_worker.strategy: Network-First for API, Cache-First for static assets
